title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0351
summary: 1 This appeal presents a problem as to the constitutionality of § 313 of the Federal Corrupt Practices Act of 1925, as amended by § 304 of the Labor Management Act of 1947, 2 U.S.C.A. Section 313 of the Federal Corrupt Practices Act now reads as stated in the margin.1 2 An indictment was returned...
